Fact: No other Pokémon has the same type combination as Golbat and its evolutionary line.
Golbat and Zubat are the only Pokémon introduced in Generation I and alongside Crobat the only Flying-type Pokémon to currently have a unique type combination.
Golbat and its evolutionary line are the only Poison-type Pokémon in the Flying Egg Group.
Golbat and its evolutionary line share their category with Woobat. They are all known as the Bat Pokémon.
The depiction of Golbat's large tongue has been sporadic, having not appeared in any game in over a decade:
The only core series games to depict its tongue were Pokémon Red and Blue.
The last game to ever depict its tongue was Pokémon Battle Revolution.
